system.description: A lifetime of searching has paid off: you discover what you've been looking for all these years. On tier 2 or deeper, you may activate this power. You learn of the location of a unique landmark - something truly extraordinary. Work out what it is with the GM. You must complete a delve to reach it. Once there, you cannot leave the landmark. Instead, you die in some tragic fashion, vow to protect it forever or ascend into a pure state of electricity and echoing rails. Your character is removed from the story.
